title: 3.5" x 1.5" Hasp & Staple Lock | Black Steel Door Latch with Concealed Fixings | Rust Resistant Hammer Finish | Shed, Gate, Cupboard & Garage Security (3.5" x 1.5")
features: Designed to secure doors, gates, sheds and storage units, providing a strong physical deterrent against tampering and forced entry
Manufactured from heat treated A3 steel with a hardened steel plate for improved strength and durability in everyday use
Fixings are hidden when the hasp is closed, helping to prevent removal or tampering from the outside
Hammer finish coating helps protect against rust and corrosion, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use

In each package, you will receive one Hasp & Staple. Each hasp measures approx. 14.5cm (5.7") x 3cm (1.2") with the staple measuring approx. 3cm (1.2") x 4cm (1.6") mounting screws are included for quick and straightforward fitting to doors, gates and cabinets
description: Secure your property with this heavy duty hasp and staple set, designed to provide reliable protection for doors, gates, sheds and storage areas. Built from heat treated A3 steel with a hardened steel plate, it offers strong resistance against wear, tampering and forced entry. The concealed fixings design ensures that screws are hidden when the hasp is closed, adding an extra layer of security by reducing access to mounting points. Finished with a rust resistant hammer coating, this latch is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, maintaining its strength and appearance over time. Supplied with mounting screws, installation is simple and suitable for a wide range of applications including garden gates, garages, cupboards and outbuildings. Whether for home or commercial use, this hasp and staple set provides a dependable and practical security solution.
